single_responsibility: Web discovery and relevance scoring of competitor candidates

required.brand_positioning: string — Sovereign niche, tier, geo, services from market-positioning.md
required.existing_slugs: array<string> — slugs already in index.json to avoid duplicates

optional.seed_urls: array<string> — manual competitor URLs provided by user

output.candidate_competitors: array<{name: string, url: string, niche: string, confidence_score: float, reason: string}>
